name: algraf-wasm
description: Browser runtime loader and TypeScript ABI types for Algraf.

scripts.build:wasm: RUSTC=$(rustup which --toolchain stable rustc) rustup run stable cargo build --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -p algraf-wasm --lib --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p dist && cp ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/algraf_wasm.wasm dist/algraf.wasm
scripts.pack:local: npm run build:wasm && mkdir -p ../../artifacts && npm pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts
